docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-28-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-28-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA FLINT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JILLIAN CHARLES IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-28-2022 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $85) SERVED JAN-21-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLES, JILLIAN
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLINT, PATRICIA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHARLES, JILLIAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY FLINT, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT CHARLES, JILLIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-28-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
